title: ?author= filter is exact-match only
suggestion: Acceptable per spec; note that partial/case-insensitive author search is not supported

title: Relies on experimental node:sqlite (Node 22.5+)

suggestion: Portability note only — avoids native-compile of better-sqlite3 but pins a recent Node and an experimental API
